---
title: "Descriptive differences"
author: Casey Breen
---

Summary: investigate specific mechanisms 

```{r}
## library packages
library(here)
source(here("code", "helpers.R"))

## birth panel
birth_panel <- read_csv(here("data", "birth_panel.csv"))
```

## Clean and filter dataset

```{r}
## Birth panel filtered
birth_panel_filtered <- birth_panel %>%
  mutate(islam = case_when(
    v130 == 3 ~ 1,
    TRUE ~ 0
  ))

## Restrict to people who lived in same house during window
birth_panel_filtered <- birth_panel_filtered %>%
  filter(year %in% 2010:2018)

## Add age cohort
birth_panel_filtered <- birth_panel_filtered %>%
  mutate(age_cohort = case_when(
    v012 >= 15 & v012 <= 24 ~ "15-24",
    v012 >= 25 & v012 <= 34 ~ "25-34",
    v012 >= 35 & v012 <= 49 ~ "35+",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ))

## Birth panel filtered
birth_panel_filtered <- birth_panel_filtered %>%
  group_by(v001) %>%
  mutate(
    expansion_3g = (pop_share_covered_3g[year == 2018][1]) -
      (pop_share_covered_3g[year == 2010][1])
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

## Restrict to places with no 3G coverage in 2010
birth_panel_filtered <- birth_panel_filtered %>%
  filter(year == 2010 & pop_share_covered_3g == 0)
```


## Set common controls (for all models)

```{r}
## Set common controls
# v190: Wealth index (1 = lowest, 5 = highest )
# v106: Highest educational level (0 = no education, 1 = primary, 2 = secondary, 3 = higher)
# v130: Religion (replace with Muslim dummy)
# v158: Frequency of radio (0 = not at all, 1 = less than once a week, 2 = more than once a week)
# v159: Frequency of watching TV (0 = not at all, 1 = less than once a week, 2 = more than once a week)

common_controls <- "v190 + v106 + v714 + islam + v158 + v159 + road_km + nl_mean + temp_mean + gdp_wght + rain_mean"

## common fixed effects
common_fes <- c("v012", "gid_1")

## weight and cluster info
common_weights <- ~ v005 / 1e6
common_cluster <- ~v001
```


## Age at first cohabitation, ideal num of children, employment 

```{r}
# Age at first sex
model_age_first_sex <- feols(
  as.formula(paste("v525 ~ expansion_3g +", common_controls)),
  fixef = common_fes,
  data = birth_panel_filtered %>% filter(v525 > 0 & v525 < 50),
  weights = common_weights,
  cluster = common_cluster
)

# Age at first cohabitation
model_age_first_cohabitation <- feols(
  as.formula(paste("v511 ~ expansion_3g +", common_controls)),
  fixef = common_fes,
  data = birth_panel_filtered %>% filter(v012 - v212 <= 7) %>% filter(!is.na(v511)),
  weights = common_weights,
  cluster = common_cluster
)

# Ideal number of children
model_age_fam_size <- feols(
  as.formula(paste("v613 ~ expansion_3g +", common_controls)),
  fixef = common_fes,
  data = birth_panel_filtered %>% filter(v613 < 93),
  weights = common_weights,
  cluster = common_cluster
)

# Employment (exclude v714 from controls to avoid perfect collinearity)
# emp_controls <- "v190 + v106 + v130 + v158 + v159"
emp_controls <- "v190 + v106 + islam + v158 + v159 + road_km + nl_mean + temp_mean + gdp_wght + rain_mean"

## Employment controls
model_employment <- feols(
  as.formula(paste("v714 ~ expansion_3g +", emp_controls)),
  fixef = common_fes,
  data = birth_panel_filtered %>% filter(v012 > 25),
  weights = common_weights,
  cluster = common_cluster
)

## Create regression table
modelsummary(
  list(
    "Age at First Sex" = model_age_first_sex,
    "Age at First Cohabitation" = model_age_first_cohabitation,
    "Ideal family size" = model_age_fam_size,
    "Employment probability" = model_employment
  ),
  stars = TRUE,
  output = here("figures", "mechanism_table.tex")
)
```


```{r}
coef_df <- bind_rows(
  broom::tidy(model_age_first_sex) %>% 
    filter(term == "expansion_3g") %>% 
    mutate(outcome = "Age at first sex"),
    
  broom::tidy(model_age_first_cohabitation) %>% 
    filter(term == "expansion_3g") %>% 
    mutate(outcome = "Age at first cohabitation"),
  
  broom::tidy(model_age_fam_size) %>% 
    filter(term == "expansion_3g") %>% 
    mutate(outcome = "Ideal family size"),
  
  broom::tidy(model_employment) %>% 
    filter(term == "expansion_3g") %>%
    mutate(outcome = "Employment")
)

# Build both CI bands once per outcome
mk_bands <- function(df, mult90, mult95) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      lo90 = if ("conf.low"  %in% names(df)) conf.low  else estimate - mult90 * std.error,
      hi90 = if ("conf.high" %in% names(df)) conf.high else estimate + mult90 * std.error,
      lo95 = estimate - mult95 * std.error,
      hi95 = estimate + mult95 * std.error
    )
}

# 1) Age at first cohabitation
d1 <- coef_df %>%
  filter(outcome == "Age at first cohabitation") %>%
  mk_bands(mult90 = interval1, mult95 = interval2)


lim1 <- max(abs(c(d1$lo95, d1$hi95)), na.rm = TRUE)

p1 <- ggplot(d1, aes(x = 0, y = estimate)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lo90, ymax = hi90), linewidth = 1.3) +                 # inner (e.g., 90%)
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lo95, ymax = hi95), size = 1.3, stroke = 1.1,       # outer (95%) + point
                  fill = "white", linewidth = 0.8, shape = 22) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-lim1, lim1), expand = expansion(mult = 0.05)) +
  labs(title = "Age at first cohabitation", x = NULL, y = "Age (years)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

# 2) Employment probability (convert to percentage points)
d2 <- coef_df %>%
  filter(outcome == "Employment") %>%
  mk_bands(mult90 = interval1, mult95 = interval2) %>%
  mutate(across(c(estimate, lo90, hi90, lo95, hi95), ~ .x * 100))

lim2 <- max(abs(c(d2$lo95, d2$hi95)), na.rm = TRUE)

p2 <- ggplot(d2, aes(x = 0, y = estimate)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lo90, ymax = hi90), linewidth = 1.3) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lo95, ymax = hi95), size = 1.3, stroke = 1.1,
                  fill = "white", linewidth = 0.8, shape = 22) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-lim2, lim2), expand = expansion(mult = 0.05)) +
  labs(title = "Employment probability", x = NULL, y = "Percentage points") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

# 3) Ideal family size
d3 <- coef_df %>%
  filter(outcome == "Ideal family size") %>%
  mk_bands(mult90 = interval1, mult95 = interval2)
lim3 <- max(abs(c(d3$lo95, d3$hi95)), na.rm = TRUE)

p3 <- ggplot(d3, aes(x = 0, y = estimate)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lo90, ymax = hi90), linewidth = 1.3) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lo95, ymax = hi95), size = 1.3, stroke = 1.1,
                  fill = "white", linewidth = 0.8, shape = 22) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-lim3, lim3), expand = expansion(mult = 0.05)) +
  labs(title = "Ideal family size", x = NULL, y = "Children (count)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

# 4) Age at first sex
d4 <- coef_df %>%
  filter(outcome == "Age at first sex") %>%
  mk_bands(mult90 = interval1, mult95 = interval2)

lim144 <- max(abs(c(d4$lo95, d4$hi95)), na.rm = TRUE)

p4 <- ggplot(d4, aes(x = 0, y = estimate)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lo90, ymax = hi90), linewidth = 1.3) +                 # inner (e.g., 90%)
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lo95, ymax = hi95), size = 1.3, stroke = 1.1,       # outer (95%) + point
                  fill = "white", linewidth = 0.8, shape = 22) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-lim1, lim1), expand = expansion(mult = 0.05)) +
  labs(title = "Age at first sex", x = NULL, y = "Age (years)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

# Combine and save
misc_mechanism_plot <- cowplot::plot_grid(p4, p1, p3, p2, nrow = 1, align = "hv")

# print out plots 
ggsave(here("figures", "misc_mechanism_plot.png"),
       plot = misc_mechanism_plot, bg = "white", height = 4, width = 12.5, dpi = 300)
```

## Contraception

```{r}
# Modern contraception model
birth_panel_filtered <- birth_panel_filtered %>%
  mutate(modern_contra = ifelse(v313 == 3, 1, 0))

# Common control formula
model_modern <- feols(
  fml = as.formula(paste("modern_contra ~ expansion_3g +", common_controls, "| v012 + gid_1")),
  data = birth_panel_filtered,
  cluster = "v001",
  split = "age_cohort"
)

summary(model_modern, "compact")


coef_modern <- imap_dfr(
  model_modern,
  ~ {
    tibble(
      term = "expansion_3g",
      estimate = coef(.x)["expansion_3g"],
      std.error = sqrt(vcov(.x)["expansion_3g", "expansion_3g"]),
      age_cohort = .y
    )
  }
) %>%
  mutate(method = "Modern")

# Traditional contraception model
birth_panel_filtered <- birth_panel_filtered %>%
  mutate(traditional_contra = ifelse(v313 == 2, 1, 0))

model_traditional <- feols(
  fml = as.formula(paste("traditional_contra ~ expansion_3g +", common_controls, "| v012 + gid_1")),
  data = birth_panel_filtered,
  cluster = "v001",
  split = "age_cohort"
)

coef_traditional <- imap_dfr(
  model_traditional,
  ~ {
    tibble(
      term = "expansion_3g",
      estimate = coef(.x)["expansion_3g"],
      std.error = sqrt(vcov(.x)["expansion_3g", "expansion_3g"]),
      age_cohort = .y
    )
  }
) %>%
  mutate(method = "Traditional")

# Folkloric contraception model
birth_panel_filtered <- birth_panel_filtered %>%
  mutate(folkloric_contra = ifelse(v313 == 1, 1, 0))

model_folkloric <- feols(
  fml = as.formula(paste("folkloric_contra ~ expansion_3g +", common_controls, "| v012 + gid_1")),
  data = birth_panel_filtered,
  cluster = "v001",
  split = "age_cohort"
)

coef_folkloric <- imap_dfr(
  model_folkloric,
  ~ {
    tibble(
      term = "expansion_3g",
      estimate = coef(.x)["expansion_3g"],
      std.error = sqrt(vcov(.x)["expansion_3g", "expansion_3g"]),
      age_cohort = .y
    )
  }
) %>%
  mutate(method = "Folkloric")

# Combine and cleans
coef_df <- bind_rows(coef_modern, coef_folkloric, coef_traditional) %>%
  mutate(
    age_cohort = str_remove(age_cohort, "sample.var: age_cohort; sample: "),
    age_cohort = factor(age_cohort, levels = c("15-24", "25-34", "35+")),
    method = factor(method, levels = c("Modern", "Folkloric", "Traditional"))
  )
```


```{r}
coef_df <- coef_df %>%
  mutate(
    estimate = estimate,
    std.error = std.error,
    CI_90_low = estimate - std.error * interval1,
    CI_90_high = estimate + std.error * interval1,
    CI_95_low = estimate - std.error * interval2,
    CI_95_high = estimate + std.error * interval2
  )

## Contraception plot
plot_contraception <- coef_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = age_cohort, y = estimate)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "gray50", lty = 2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = CI_90_low, ymax = CI_90_high, color = method), size = 1.3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = CI_95_low, ymax = CI_95_high, color = method),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    shape = 21, size = 1.5, stroke = 1.5, fill = "white", linewidth = .8
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) x * 100) +
  ggsci::scale_color_jama() +
  labs(
    title = "Contraception Use",
    x = "Age Group",
    y = "Percentage Point Change",
    color = "Method",
    shape = "Method"
  ) +
  cowplot::theme_cowplot() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_demography()
```


```{r}
birth_panel_filtered <- birth_panel_filtered %>%
  mutate(knows_birth_control = case_when(v301 %in% 2:3 ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0))

birth_control_restricted <- feols(
  fml = as.formula(paste("knows_birth_control ~ expansion_3g +", common_controls, "| v012 + gid_1")),
  data = birth_panel_filtered %>% filter(year == 2010 & pop_share_covered_3g == 0),
  cluster = "v001",
  split = "age_cohort"
)

birth_control_restricted <- imap_dfr(
  birth_control_restricted,
  ~ {
    tibble(
      term = "expansion_3g",
      estimate = coef(.x)["expansion_3g"],
      std.error = sqrt(vcov(.x)["expansion_3g", "expansion_3g"]),
      age_cohort = .y
    )
  }
) %>%
  mutate(method = "Folkloric")


# Combine and clean
coef_df <- birth_control_restricted %>%
  mutate(
    age_cohort = str_remove(age_cohort, "sample.var: age_cohort; sample: "),
    age_cohort = factor(age_cohort, levels = c("15-24", "25-34", "35+"))
  )

baseline <- 95


coef_df <- coef_df %>%
  mutate(
    estimate = estimate,
    std.error = std.error,
    CI_90_low = estimate - std.error * interval1,
    CI_90_high = estimate + std.error * interval1,
    CI_95_low = estimate - std.error * interval2,
    CI_95_high = estimate + std.error * interval2
  )

## plot contraception knowledge
plot_contraception_knowledge <- coef_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = age_cohort, y = estimate)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "gray50", lty = 2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = CI_90_low, ymax = CI_90_high), size = 1.3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = CI_95_low, ymax = CI_95_high),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    shape = 21, size = 1.5, stroke = 1.5, fill = "white", linewidth = .8, color = "darkgreen"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Contraception Knowledge",
    x = "Age Group",
    y = "Percentage Point Change",
    color = "Method", 
    shape = "Method"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) x * 100) +
  cowplot::theme_cowplot() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_demography()


contraception_figure <- cowplot::plot_grid(plot_contraception, plot_contraception_knowledge, nrow = 2)

# Save plot
ggsave(
  plot = contraception_figure, filename = here("figures", "contraception_figure.png"),
  bg = "white", height = 7, width = 7
)
```


## Empowerment 

```{r}
## Birth panel restricted
birth_panel_restricted_special <- birth_panel_filtered %>%
  filter(!is.na(v743a)) %>%
  mutate(
    v743a = ifelse(v743a %in% c(1), 1, 0),
    v743b = ifelse(v743b %in% c(1), 1, 0),
    v743d = ifelse(v743d %in% c(1), 1, 0),
    v743f = ifelse(v743f %in% c(1), 1, 0),
    v739  = ifelse(v739 %in% c(1), 1, 0)
  )

## set empowerment outcomes 
outcomes <- c("v743a", "v743b", "v743d", "v743f", "v739")

models <- map(outcomes,
              ~ feols(fml = as.formula(paste(
                .x, "~ expansion_3g + ", common_controls, "| v012 + gid_1")),
                data = birth_panel_restricted_special %>% filter(year == 2010, pop_share_covered_3g == 0),
                cluster = "v001"
              ))

names(models) <- outcomes

outcome_labels <- c(
  v743a = "Own health care",
  v743b = "Large household purchases",
  v743d = "Visits to family",
  v743f = "Spend husband earnings",
  v739 = "Spend own earnings"
)

coef_df_empower <- imap_dfr(models, ~ {
  broom::tidy(.x) %>%
    filter(term == "expansion_3g") %>%
    mutate(outcome = outcome_labels[.y])
})

coef_df_empower <- coef_df_empower %>%
  mutate(
    estimate = estimate,
    std.error = std.error,
    CI_90_low = estimate - std.error * interval1,
    CI_90_high = estimate + std.error * interval1,
    CI_95_low = estimate - std.error * interval2,
    CI_95_high = estimate + std.error * interval2
  ) %>%
  mutate(def = "Women alone")
```


```{r}
## Birth panel restricted
birth_panel_restricted_special <- birth_panel_filtered %>%
  filter(!is.na(v743a)) %>%
  mutate(
    v743a = ifelse(v743a %in% c(2), 1, 0),
    v743b = ifelse(v743b %in% c(2), 1, 0),
    v743d = ifelse(v743d %in% c(2), 1, 0),
    v743f = ifelse(v743f %in% c(2), 1, 0),
    v739 =  ifelse(v739 %in%  c(2), 1, 0)
  )

outcomes <- c("v743a", "v743b", "v743d", "v743f", "v739")

models <- map(outcomes,
              ~ feols(fml = as.formula(paste(
                .x, "~ expansion_3g + ", common_controls, "| v012 + gid_1")),
                data = birth_panel_restricted_special),
                cluster = "v001")

names(models) <- outcomes

coef_df_empower_partner <- imap_dfr(models, ~ {
  broom::tidy(.x) %>%
    filter(term == "expansion_3g") %>%
    mutate(outcome = outcome_labels[.y])
})

coef_df_empower_partner <- coef_df_empower_partner %>%
  mutate(
    estimate = estimate,
    std.error = std.error,
    CI_90_low = estimate - std.error * interval1,
    CI_90_high = estimate + std.error * interval1,
    CI_95_low = estimate - std.error * interval2,
    CI_95_high = estimate + std.error * interval2
  ) %>%
  mutate(def = "Joint with partner")
```


```{r}
## Birth panel restricted
birth_panel_restricted_special <- birth_panel_filtered %>%
  filter(!is.na(v743a)) %>%
  mutate(
    v743a = ifelse(v743a %in% c(4), 1, 0),
    v743b = ifelse(v743b %in% c(4), 1, 0),
    v743d = ifelse(v743d %in% c(4), 1, 0),
    v743f = ifelse(v743f %in% c(4), 1, 0),
    v739 =  ifelse(v739 %in%  c(4), 1, 0)
  )

outcomes <- c("v743a", "v743b", "v743d", "v743f", "v739")

models <- map(outcomes,
              ~ feols(fml = as.formula(paste(
                .x, "~ expansion_3g + ", common_controls, "| v012 + gid_1")),
                data = birth_panel_restricted_special),
                cluster = "v001")

names(models) <- outcomes

coef_df_empower_husband_alone <- imap_dfr(models, ~ {
  broom::tidy(.x) %>%
    filter(term == "expansion_3g") %>%
    mutate(outcome = outcome_labels[.y])
})

coef_df_empower_husband_alone <- coef_df_empower_husband_alone %>%
  mutate(
    estimate = estimate,
    std.error = std.error,
    CI_90_low = estimate - std.error * interval1,
    CI_90_high = estimate + std.error * interval1,
    CI_95_low = estimate - std.error * interval2,
    CI_95_high = estimate + std.error * interval2
  ) %>%
  mutate(def = "Husband Alone")
```





```{r}
## coefficient empower
coef_df_empower_combined <- coef_df_empower %>% 
  bind_rows(coef_df_empower_partner) %>% 
  bind_rows(coef_df_empower_husband_alone)

## plot contraception knowledge
empower_plot <- coef_df_empower_combined %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = outcome, y = estimate)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "gray50", lty = 2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = CI_90_low, ymax = CI_90_high, color = def), size = 1.3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = CI_95_low, ymax = CI_95_high, color = def),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    shape = 21, size = 1.5, stroke = 1.5, fill = "white", linewidth = .8
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) x * 100) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Percentage Point Change",
    color = "Decisions made: ",
    shape = ""
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cud) + 
  cowplot::theme_cowplot() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_demography() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"))

# Save plot
ggsave(
  plot = empower_plot,
  filename = here("figures", "empower_plot.png"),
  height = 4, width = 12, bg = "white"
)
```
